_comment: ADOPTER EXAMPLE — the second-line release hold (Loom 2.0 §7.4). This file lives under docs/governance/changes/, which CODEOWNERS assigns to the second line: builders and agents CANNOT edit it without a second-line review. Production authorization requires status 'released' by a second-line human; a missing file means HELD (fail closed). This change is in delivery, so the hold is in its default state.
reason: Default hold until PA2 and operational readiness complete.
